description.p: This Note is a private, offline-only note-taking app. Your notes never leave your device — no account, no cloud sync, no network access of any kind.

ul.li: AES-256-GCM encryption with per-note password protection
Organize with nested folders, tags, and note-to-note links
Mind-map your ideas visually with the built-in Synapse canvas
Writing stats: word count, reading time, and tracked writing time
12 themes, rich text formatting, and a clean three-panel layout

description.p: The master encryption key is stored in the OS secret service (GNOME Keyring / libsecret). No data is written outside your local app directory.

screenshot.caption: Three-panel layout with note tree, editor, and writing stats
Nested folders, notes, and tags — organized your way
No account. No cloud. No compromise.
Notes, to-dos, and mind maps in one place
